reserveRows.title: Assistive trust-envelope publication
reserveRows.phase9Use: ExperienceContinuityControlEvidence and AssistiveContinuityEvidenceProjection must inherit one current trust envelope for visible posture.

reserveRows.title: Rollout ladder, watch tuple, kill switch, and rollback evidence
reserveRows.phase9Use: Release and operations assurance may ingest only published rollout verdicts, freeze records, and rollback bundles.

reserveRows.title: Human approval and workspace-protection leases
reserveRows.phase9Use: Audit and assurance must prove human settlement, clinician edits, override reasons, and lease-backed actionability.

reserveRows.title: Disclosure-safe telemetry and evidence graph inputs
reserveRows.phase9Use: Assurance ledger ingestion must use redacted, replayable, schema-pinned assistive evidence rather than raw prompt or transcript content.

reserveRows.title: Artifact presentation and outbound-navigation contracts
reserveRows.phase9Use: Evidence exports, assurance packs, and operator replay must bind summary-first artifact and safe handoff law.

reserveRows.title: Operator-visible freeze and recovery posture
reserveRows.phase9Use: Operations routes must display stale, frozen, quarantined, or observe-only assistive states from canonical freeze disposition.

reserveRows.title: Safety case, DTAC, DCB, RFC, and training-label evidence
reserveRows.phase9Use: Assurance packs must inherit safety-case deltas, RFC decision trails, DTAC/DCB evidence, and trainability revocations.

reserveRows.title: Replay, restore, and migration-ready assistive evidence
reserveRows.phase9Use: Phase 9 restore, replay, export, and retention proof must inherit Phase 8 replay bundle and artifact lineage state.
